body.description: Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Once on each of your turns when you miss with an attack roll, you can hit instead.
Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). As a bonus action, teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Increase one ability score by 1 (max 30). Gain proficiency in all skills.
